name: android-liblog
title: android-liblog
description:
Android NDK logger interfaces
liblog represents an interface to the volatile Android Logging system for NDK
(Native) applications and libraries. Interfaces for either writing or reading
logs. The log buffers are divided up in Main, System, Radio and Events
sub-logs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-liblog because Android NDK logger interfaces.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-liblog as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-liblog with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-liblog --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
